Class MusicLibrary

java.lang.Object
com.mycompany.lab2.model.MusicLibrary
public class MusicLibrary extends Object
Represents a music library that stores a collection of songs and playlists. Allows adding, removing, searching, saving, and loading songs. Supports multiple playlists (including favorites or custom ones).
Version:
3.1
Author:
Mateusz Smuda

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MusicLibrary()
    Constructs an empty MusicLibrary.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addLog(String entry)
    Adds an entry to the activity log.
    void
    addPlaylist(String name)
    Adds a new playlist with the given name.

    addSong(Song song)
    Adds a new song to the library.
    void
    addSongToPlaylist(String playlistName, Song song)
    Adds a song to a specified playlist.
    List<Song>
    filterSongs(SongPredicate predicate)
    Returns a list of songs that match the provided predicate.
    List<String>
    getActivityLog()
    Returns a snapshot copy of the activity log for safe iteration.
    Playlist
    getPlaylist(String name)
    Returns a playlist by its name.
    void
    loadFromFile(String filename)
    Loads all songs and playlists from a text file.
    boolean
    removePlaylist(String name)
    Removes a playlist from the library by its name.
    boolean
    removeSong(String title, String artist)
    Removes a song from the library (and from all playlists) based on title and artist.
    void
    removeSongFromPlaylist(String playlistName, Song song)
    Removes a song from a specified playlist.
    void
    saveToFile(String filename)
    Saves all songs and playlists to a text file.

  • Constructor Details

    • MusicLibrary

      public MusicLibrary()
      Constructs an empty MusicLibrary.

  • Method Details

    • addLog

      public void addLog(String entry)
      Adds an entry to the activity log.

    • getActivityLog

      public List<String> getActivityLog()
      Returns a snapshot copy of the activity log for safe iteration.

    • addSong

      public void addSong(Song song) throws DuplicateSongException
      Adds a new song to the library.
      Parameters:
      song - the Song to be added
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the song is null
      DuplicateSongException - if the same song (title and artist) already exists

    • removeSong

      public boolean removeSong(String title, String artist)
      Removes a song from the library (and from all playlists) based on title and artist.
      Parameters:
      title - the title of the song to remove
      artist - the artist of the song to remove
      Returns:
      true if the song was removed, otherwise false
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if title or artist are empty

    • addPlaylist

      public void addPlaylist(String name)
      Adds a new playlist with the given name.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the playlist to create
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the name is empty or already exists

    • removePlaylist

      public boolean removePlaylist(String name)
      Removes a playlist from the library by its name.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the playlist to remove
      Returns:
      true if the playlist was removed, otherwise false

    • getPlaylist

      public Playlist getPlaylist(String name)
      Returns a playlist by its name.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the playlist to search for
      Returns:
      the playlist if found, otherwise null

    • addSongToPlaylist

      public void addSongToPlaylist(String playlistName, Song song)
      Adds a song to a specified playlist.
      Parameters:
      playlistName - the name of the playlist
      song - the song to add
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the playlist does not exist

    • removeSongFromPlaylist

      public void removeSongFromPlaylist(String playlistName, Song song)
      Removes a song from a specified playlist.
      Parameters:
      playlistName - the name of the playlist
      song - the song to remove
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the playlist does not exist

    • saveToFile

      public void saveToFile(String filename) throws IOException
      Saves all songs and playlists to a text file.
      Parameters:
      filename - the name of the file used for saving
      Throws:
      IOException - if the file cannot be written
      IllegalArgumentException - if filename is empty

    • loadFromFile

      public void loadFromFile(String filename) throws IOException
      Loads all songs and playlists from a text file.
      Parameters:
      filename - the file to read data from
      Throws:
      IOException - if the file cannot be read or format is invalid
      IllegalArgumentException - if filename is empty

    • filterSongs

      public List<Song> filterSongs(SongPredicate predicate)
      Returns a list of songs that match the provided predicate. This demonstrates the use of a custom functional interface with lambdas.
      Parameters:
      predicate - the condition to test songs against
      Returns:
      a new list containing only songs that satisfy the predicate
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if predicate is null
